mood: Mega elegant, extreme high-quality, modern, impressive (WoW effect)

layout.grid_strategy: Bento Grid (Mode A) for marketing sections. Asymmetrical spans, gap-8 to gap-12.

surface_styles.cards: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-white/20 transition-all duration-300 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.12)]
surface_styles.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-2xl border-b border-white/10
surface_styles.buttons_primary: bg-gradient-to-r from-gray-200 via-white to-gray-200 text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:scale-105 transition-transform flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]

components.proactive_ai_chat: Floating crystal glassmorphism widget (bottom right). Uses Shadcn Popover/Dialog. Incorporate a silver pulse effect. Must simulate proactively offering and creating proposals for clients.
components.language_switcher: Shadcn DropdownMenu in the header. Toggle between DE and NL. State must reflect globally across all text.
components.pricing_calculator: Shadcn Slider and Input components inside a technical, high-end Bento grid card. Real-time updates for cost savings/ROI.
components.legal_pages: Dense, clean text layouts. Left-aligned, readable max-w-3xl containers with generous line-height.

hero_backgrounds.description: Dark Silver Wavy Lines for main hero section background
Black and white wavy shapes for secondary sections

tech_visuals.description: AI chip, good for platform overview
AI node close up for process/services

corporate_office.description: Modern dark corporate office architecture for 'About Us' section

pages_structure: Hero/Homepage (WOW effect, immersive silver dark theme, dynamic text)
Services / Leistungen (Extensive details, bento layout cards)
Pricing & Calculator / Preise (Interactive sliders to calculate ROI/Costs)
References / Referenzen (Testimonials in crystal glass cards)
Knowledge/Blog / Wissen (Grid of articles with silver hover effects)
About / Über uns (Agency background, mission, corporate imagery)
Contact / Kontakt (Shadcn Forms, dark elegant inputs)
Legal Pages (Impressum, AGB, Datenschutz, AVV, Widerruf, Cookie-Richtlinie, KI-Hinweise)
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement a 'mega edles Darkdesign' (mega luxury dark design) using Archetype 5 (Luxury) principles.
Rebrand as 'NeXify AI'. Create a purely typographic, high-end logo in the header using the 'Outfit' font with a subtle silver gradient.
Ensure full bilingual structure (DE/NL) using a context provider or i18n library. The language switcher must work seamlessly.
Build an interactive pricing calculator using Shadcn UI components. Ensure sliding values dynamically update the final price.
Build the proactive AI live chat widget. It must feel 'alive'—perhaps popping up after a few seconds with a personalized offer generation hook.
Use generous padding (py-24, py-32) for sections to allow the dark luxury theme to breathe. Never cram content.
Use 'lenis' for smooth scrolling to give the site a premium momentum feel.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='lang-switcher-de', data-testid='hero-cta').
Avoid standard Shadcn Vercel-like borders. Override them with 'border-white/10' and 'bg-white/5' for true glassmorphism.
